name: aotea-house-points-postgres
description: Aotea College House Points — PostgreSQL version with Express backend and React frontend

scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:reset: psql -d house_points -c 'DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && psql -d house_points -f db/schema.sql && psql -d house_points -f db/seed.sql
